extortion.description: Since 2003, the Hoffmann Group from Bernau has been a reliable partner in the areas of transport and recycling, earthworks and demolition, as well as ready-mix concrete and waste wood processing, enabling its customers to obtain all services related to a construction project from a single source. In addition to maintenance and repair, the company also serves as a competent contact for the sale of construction machineryDatabaseFinancial documentsPersonal information of employees and clients https://www.firmengruppe-hoffmann.de/
